'''podhajaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:yng|yng]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-dh-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:yng|yng]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| podhajaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:podhajithi|podhajithi]] || [[word:podhajiji|podhajiji]] || [[word:podhajishi|podhajishi]] || [[word:podhajiki|podhajiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:podhajuthuthu|podhajuthuthu]] || [[word:podhajujuju|podhajujuju]] || [[word:podhajushushu|podhajushushu]] || [[word:podhajukuku|podhajukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:podhajuthu|podhajuthu]] || [[word:podhajuju|podhajuju]] || [[word:podhajushu|podhajushu]] || [[word:podhajuku|podhajuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:podhajufthuf|podhajufthuf]] || [[word:podhajufjuf|podhajufjuf]] || [[word:podhajufshuf|podhajufshuf]] || [[word:podhajufkuf|podhajufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:podhajethe|podhajethe]] || [[word:podhajeje|podhajeje]] || [[word:podhajeshe|podhajeshe]] || [[word:podhajeke|podhajeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:podhajothotho|podhajothotho]] || [[word:podhajojojo|podhajojojo]] || [[word:podhajoshosho|podhajoshosho]] || [[word:podhajokoko|podhajokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:podhajotho|podhajotho]] || [[word:podhajojo|podhajojo]] || [[word:podhajosho|podhajosho]] || [[word:podhajoko|podhajoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:podhajofthof|podhajofthof]] || [[word:podhajofjof|podhajofjof]] || [[word:podhajofshof|podhajofshof]] || [[word:podhajofkof|podhajofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:podhajïfthïf|podhajïfthïf]] || [[word:podhajïfjïf|podhajïfjïf]] || [[word:podhajïfshïf|podhajïfshïf]] || [[word:podhajïfkïf|podhajïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:podhajïfthïfthïf|podhajïfthïfthïf]] || [[word:podhajïfjïfjïf|podhajïfjïfjïf]] || [[word:podhajïfshïfshïf|podhajïfshïfshïf]] || [[word:podhajïfkïfkïf|podhajïfkïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:podhajïfthïf|podhajïfthïf]] || [[word:podhajïfjïf|podhajïfjïf]] || [[word:podhajïfshïf|podhajïfshïf]] || [[word:podhajïfkïf|podhajïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:podhajïfthïf|podhajïfthïf]] || [[word:podhajïfjïf|podhajïfjïf]] || [[word:podhajïfshïf|podhajïfshïf]] || [[word:podhajïfkïf|podhajïfkïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:podhajæthæ|podhajæthæ]] || [[word:podhajæjæ|podhajæjæ]] || [[word:podhajæshæ|podhajæshæ]] || [[word:podhajækæ|podhajækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:podhajathatha|podhajathatha]] || [[word:podhajajaja|podhajajaja]] || [[word:podhajashasha|podhajashasha]] || [[word:podhajakaka|podhajakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:podhajatha|podhajatha]] || [[word:podhajaja|podhajaja]] || [[word:podhajasha|podhajasha]] || [[word:podhajaka|podhajaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:podhajafthaf|podhajafthaf]] || [[word:podhajafjaf|podhajafjaf]] || [[word:podhajafshaf|podhajafshaf]] || [[word:podhajafkaf|podhajafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:podhajasha|podhajasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:podhajshësha|podhajshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:podhajrosha|podhajrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:podhajmusha|podhajmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:podhajyasha|podhajyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gopodhajnkshësha|gopodhajnkshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gopodhajnkrosha|gopodhajnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gopodhajnkmusha|gopodhajnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gopodhajnkyasha|gopodhajnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:podhadhajasha|podhadhajasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:podhadhajshësha|podhadhajshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:podhadhajrosha|podhadhajrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:podhadhajmusha|podhadhajmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:podhadhajyasha|podhadhajyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gopodhadhajnkshësha|gopodhadhajnkshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gopodhadhajnkrosha|gopodhadhajnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gopodhadhajnkmusha|gopodhadhajnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gopodhadhajnkyasha|gopodhadhajnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:pedhæjasha|pedhæjasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:pedhæjshësha|pedhæjshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:pedhæjrosha|pedhæjrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:pedhæjmusha|pedhæjmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:pedhæjyasha|pedhæjyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gopedhæjnkshësha|gopedhæjnkshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gopedhæjnkrosha|gopedhæjnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gopedhæjnkmusha|gopedhæjnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gopedhæjnkyasha|gopedhæjnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:podhfajasha|podhfajasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:podhfajshësha|podhfajshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:podhfajrosha|podhfajrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:podhfajmusha|podhfajmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:podhfajyasha|podhfajyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gopodhfajnkshësha|gopodhfajnkshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gopodhfajnkrosha|gopodhfajnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gopodhfajnkmusha|gopodhfajnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gopodhfajnkyasha|gopodhfajnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d2c7592}}
